title: verbascum oreophilum var. joannis
intro: Verbascum oreophilum var. joannis is a plant species within the verbascum genus, specifically a variety of Verbascum oreophilum, commonly known as mountain mullein or alpine mullein. It is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The leaves and flowers of Verbascum oreophilum var. joannis have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to their anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to offer health benefits such as relieving coughs and promoting healthy digestion.
